title: Women’s Weekend Squash Event 2020
excerpt: Thank you to everyone who made the 2020 edition of the Women’s Weekend squash event, hosted at the Edmonton Squash Club such a success. Here are some of the photos from the weekend taken by Joe Mann.
content: Thank you to everyone who made the 2020 edition of the Women’s Weekend squash event, hosted at the Edmonton Squash Club such a success. Here are some of the photos from the weekend taken by Joe Mann.
